title: ingest-entra-directory-audit-ocsf MCP parameters
description: Typed CLI parameters for Entra directory audit JSON/JSONL to OCSF API Activity ingestion.

input_path.description: Path to raw Entra directoryAudit JSON or JSONL. Omit to read stdin via the input field.

output_path.description: Write OCSF JSONL to this path instead of stdout.
